name_en: M25445 Pink Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features a rhombus pattern leather with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing a rock-chic style. The shiny chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
